signIn.termsPrefix: By signing in, you agree to our

createOrg.title: Create Organization
createOrg.subtitle: Set up your organization to get started
createOrg.nameDescription: The name of your organization or team
createOrg.slugDescription: A unique identifier for your organization (auto-generated from name)
createOrg.slugMinLength: Slug must be at least 3 characters
createOrg.slugChars: Slug can only contain lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens
createOrg.slugStart: Slug must start with a letter or number
createOrg.slugEnd: Slug must end with a letter or number

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.subtitle: Customize how Superset looks on your device

lightTheme.label: Light theme
lightTheme.hint: Used when your system is in light mode.

darkTheme.label: Dark theme
darkTheme.hint: Used when your system is in dark mode.

custom.label: Custom themes
custom.hint: Import a theme file or grab a starter to edit.

toast.reservedIds: All themes used reserved IDs (built-in or system).
toast.emptyFile: The file did not contain any importable themes.

signOut.label: Sign out of this device
signOut.hint: You'll need to sign in again to use Superset on this device.

organization.title: Organization
organization.subtitle: Manage your organization's branding and members.

confirmQuit.label: Confirm before quitting
confirmQuit.hint: Show a confirmation dialog when quitting the app

fileOpenMode.label: File open mode
fileOpenMode.hint: Choose how files open when no preview pane exists

resourceMonitor.label: Resource monitor
resourceMonitor.hint: Show CPU and memory usage in the top bar

openLinksInApp.label: Open links in app browser
openLinksInApp.hint: Open links from chat and terminal in the built-in browser instead of your default browser

experimental.title: Experimental
experimental.subtitle: Try early access features and previews.

v1Migration.label: Import from v1
v1Migration.hint: Bring v1 projects, workspaces, and terminal presets over to v2. Each item is imported individually and can be retried.

restartOnboarding.label: Restart onboarding
restartOnboarding.hint: Walk through the v2 setup flow again from the beginning.
restartOnboarding.dialogDescription: This clears your onboarding progress and reopens the setup flow. You'll walk through each step again — for steps you're already configured for (provider connected, project attached), you'll see the current status with a Continue button.

security.title: Security
security.subtitle: Control how your local machine is reachable from remote workspaces

relay.label: Allow remote workspaces to access this device via relay
relay.hint: When off, your local tools and files cannot be reached from any remote workspace through the Superset relay. This does not affect your ability to connect out to remote sandboxes from this device.

models.title: Models
models.subtitle: Manage provider accounts, API keys, and overrides.

permissions.title: Permissions
permissions.subtitle: Grant the OS permissions Superset needs.

fullDiskAccess.label: Full Disk Access
fullDiskAccess.description: Persistent access to Documents, Downloads, Desktop, and iCloud.

accessibility.label: Accessibility
accessibility.description: Send keystrokes, manage windows, and control other applications.

microphone.label: Microphone
microphone.description: Use voice transcription and push-to-talk features.

automation.label: Automation
automation.description: Run terminal commands and interact with other applications.

localNetwork.label: Local Network
localNetwork.description: Discover and connect to development servers on your network.

ringtones.title: Notifications
ringtones.subtitle: Sounds and ringtone for completed tasks

git.title: Git & worktrees
git.subtitle: Configure git branch and worktree behavior

deleteLocalBranch.label: Delete local branch on workspace removal
deleteLocalBranch.hint: Also delete the local git branch when deleting a worktree workspace

branchPrefix.label: Branch prefix
branchPrefix.hintIntro: Group new branches under a folder.
